drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0($b0_0_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF0(), $p0_0.getF1(), true));
    insert(new T1(8, $p0_0.getF1(), true));
end
rule "R1"
salience -9
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f0 < 9, f1 >= "zz")
then
    insert(new T1(-2, $p1_0.getF1(), false));
end
rule "R2"
salience 1
when
    T1(f1 > "a", f1 != "", $b2_0_0 : f2, $b2_0_1 : f0)
    $p2_1 : T1(f0 != 0.0, f1 > "ab", $b2_1_0 : f0, f2 == false)
then
    modify($p2_1) { setF2(true), setF0(6) }
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T1($b3_0_0 : f0, f2 == false)
then
    modify($p3_0) { setF2(true) }
end
name: fz_42_124
